description: CompositionBlack shorts made of 100% cotton, has an elasticated waistband and drawstring, two insert pockets on the sides and embroidered logo on the left leg FittingRegularWash care Gentle machine wash in cool water Do not bleach Tumble dry at low temperature Warm iron Do not dry clean Relax and chill out in these comfy dark grey shorts from puma. The soft and broad elasticated waistband sits snug around your waist, while the drawstring allows you to customize the Fit. These cotton shorts stretch and move with your body, offering a comfortable training session. Team it with a yoga t-shirt and fitness shoes for absolute comfort.Model statisticsThe model wears trousers of length 44"Height-6.3”, Waist – 32”, Hips – 40”
